title: Playground Diagnostics Console
concept: A support-focused operations console with a protected live WordPress browser, compact command bar, and right inspector for runtime status, settings reloads, database details, logs, save destinations, transfers, and saved-site mutations.
focus: large live browser plus right inspector
flows: Change WordPress, PHP, language, and network settings for a saved Playground, confirm Save & Reload, show progress, and update the runtime badge and diagnostics history
Preview the unsaved reset warning that explains destructive reset consequences for temporary Playgrounds
Delete an active saved Playground with cancel, confirm, progress, row removal, and fallback to an Unsaved Playground
Save to browser storage or to a local directory with distinct destination consequences and file-copy progress
Create or import through Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, and .zip import routes
Use Site Manager tabs for settings, files, Blueprint JSON, database tools, logs, GitHub export, and zip download while the live browser remains visible
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start route
WordPress PR preview input
Gutenberg PR or branch input
GitHub import with account connection and token warning
Blueprint URL runner
Import .zip route with replacement warning
Blueprint gallery categories, search, selected detail, and honest representative subset of 43
Featured blueprint shortcuts from captured gallery names
Save temporary Playground in browser storage
Save to a local directory with folder permission consequence
Save progress with file counts
Saved and unsaved Playground list
Rename affordance and delete saved Playground
Delete confirmation, cancel, progress, row removal, and active-site fallback
Active path input and refresh
Homepage and WP Admin shortcuts
Temporary and saved shell states
Settings for WordPress version, PHP version, language, older versions, network access, and multisite
Destructive unsaved reset warning and stored Save & Reload behavior
File browser with new file, new folder, upload, browse, selected editor, dirty state, and save result
Blueprint editor with copy, download, run, validation, and result state
SQLite-backed database path, driver, and size
Download database.sqlite
Open Adminer and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with realistic warnings
Export to GitHub
Download as zip
Transfer history for GitHub, ZIP, database, Blueprint, settings, save, and delete actions
